task_completion.description: Open the dual_parachute_deployment.ork file in OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket application window is open with 'dual_parachute_deployment' visible in the title bar or the rocket design component tree.

task_completion.description: Add a first launch lug to the rocket exterior with the specified dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Launch lug' component is visible in the rocket design tree. The configuration dialog for the lug may be visible, showing an Outer Diameter between 8mm and 12mm and a Length between 10mm and 20mm.

task_completion.description: Add a second launch lug with the same radial angle and at least 300mm longitudinal separation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two 'Launch lug' components are present in the design tree. The rocket side view or 3D view shows two lugs aligned radially but separated significantly along the body tube. Position configuration dialogs may show a difference of at least 300mm (30cm) in their longitudinal positions.

task_completion.description: Run a flight simulation to verify the updated drag profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab is active, and a simulation run is visible (e.g., a 'Run simulations' button being clicked, a plot window, or updated simulation results in the table).

task_completion.description: Export a PDF containing 'Fin templates' and 'Fin marking guide'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket 'Print / Export' dialog is open with 'Fin templates' and 'Fin marking guide' selected, or a file manager/terminal shows 'manufacturing_blueprints.pdf' created in '~/Documents/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Save the updated rocket design to manufacturing_ready.ork.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save as' dialog pointing to '~/Documents/rockets/manufacturing_ready.ork' is visible, or the OpenRocket window title updates to 'manufacturing_ready.ork', or a terminal/file manager shows the file created.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design and export the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket application windows, dialogs, and menus, rather than the agent using a text editor to manually edit the .ork XML file.

integrity.description: The PDF export was generated via OpenRocket's built-in print/export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket 'Print / Export' dialog is visible with the correct options checked, rather than the agent using a separate tool or script to create a dummy PDF file.

integrity.description: The simulation was actually run within the OpenRocket software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation plot or results window is shown in the GUI, indicating a real calculation took place, rather than just a fake text output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source file is 'dual_parachute_deployment.ork'. The target ORK file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/manufacturing_ready.ork'. The exported PDF must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/manufacturing_blueprints.pdf'. The launch lugs must have an outer diameter between 8mm and 12mm (0.008-0.012m), a length between 10mm and 20mm (0.01-0.02m), and be separated by at least 300mm (0.3m) longitudinally.
